docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CAMPBELL, MARJORIE AS TO DEFENDANT SACK, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER (SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TYIAL GRANED
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 08/19/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
ORDER RE:FILE DESTROYED PER AUGUST 19,2021 ORDER
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SACK, MICHAEL
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-23-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-09-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPBELL, MARJORIE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-27-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MARJORIE CAMPBELL & DEFENDANT MICHAEL SACK. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED TODAY, 9/6/16. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN A MEDIATION SESSION CONDUCTED BY STUDENTS FROM HASTINGS LAW SCHOOL. THE COURT SHALL DISMISS THIS MATTER WITH PREJUDICE IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY CAMPBELL, MARJORIE SACK, MICHAEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00 SERVED JUL-21-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SACK, MICHAEL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PURSUANT THE SEP-06-16 COURT ORDER THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE IF PARTIES DO NOT APPEAR AT THE JAN-23-17 HEARING. PLAINTIFF MARJORIE CAMPBELL IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL SACK IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
